# Lakeside & Purfleet Taxis Ltd

> Thurrock's trusted local taxi company, serving Grays, Purfleet, Lakeside and the surrounding Essex area since 1990. Local taxis, airport transfers, school runs, corporate travel and long-distance journeys, available 24/7.

Lakeside & Purfleet Taxis Ltd provides fixed-price, pre-bookable taxi services across Thurrock, Essex. Quotes are requested online or via WhatsApp/phone and confirmed by the team within two hours — no payment is taken at the time of the request.

## Services

- [Local Taxis](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/local-taxis): Local taxi journeys across Grays, Purfleet, Chafford Hundred, Tilbury, Aveley, West Thurrock and Stanford-le-Hope.
- [Airport Transfers](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/airport-transfers): Fixed-price transfers to Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton, London City and Southend airports.
- [School Runs](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/school-runs): Regular and one-off school transport with DBS-checked drivers.
- [Corporate Accounts](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/corporate-accounts): Managed business travel accounts with invoicing.
- [Long Distance Travel](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/long-distance-travel): UK-wide journeys with upfront pricing.
- [Tilbury Cruise Terminal Transfers](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/tilbury-cruise-terminal): Transfers to and from Tilbury Cruise Terminal.
- [Areas Covered](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/areas-covered): Full list of towns and areas served.
- [Request a Quote](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/quote-request): Online quote request form — no payment required, reply within two hours.

## Company

- [About](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/about): Company background and history since 1990.
- [Contact](https://lakesidetaxi.co.uk/contact): Phone, WhatsApp and email contact details.
